Brittany uses 1/4 ounce of shampoo every other day. Over the course of a leap year, which has 366 days, she will use 1/4 ounce of shampoo approximately 183 times (366 ÷ 2). This means she will use a total of [183] ounces of shampoo. Since each bottle contains 14 ounces, she will need to purchase [14] bottles to cover her shampoo needs. 

She needs to buy enough shampoo to last through the entire leap year, which means she must account for the total amount of shampoo she will use. Each bottle contains 14 ounces, and she will use 1/4 ounce every other day. Therefore, she will need to buy [14] bottles to ensure she has enough shampoo for the entire year.
